name: Cranberry Christmas Pudding and Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pudding ingredients in the order listed: cranberries, washed cranberry bag, molasses, soda dissolved in water, flour, and salt.
2. Steam the pudding for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
3. In a separate pan, mix the sauce ingredients (sugar, butter, whipping cream, and vanilla extract) and simmer for a few minutes.
4. Serve warm over the cooked pudding.
5. Enjoy this rich taste experience where fresh cranberries provide a burst of sour flavor followed by the sweetness of the sauce on your taste buds. It is truly a memorable culinary experience.
